title: Naruto ender eyes
description: A resource pack that allows you to turn ender eyes into a naruto anime Dojutsu.
body:
**This is a resource pack that allows you to turn ender eyes into a naruto anime Dojutsu using CIT Resewn features or OptiFine.**

## To do this, rename Ender eye on the anvil to one of these:
- hermit mode
- byakugan
- rinnegan
- sharingan


![Renaming](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ac8f4e019512589170deb4e9c1a325785407806e.png)
